subtitle: Large Language Models
description: Master LLMs from embeddings and tokenization to Transformers, BERT, GPT, and practical applications.

challenges.title: Introduction to Large Language Models
challenges.description: History of Language AI, word embeddings, word2vec, Transformer architecture, BERT, GPT models, and LLM fundamentals

challenges.title: Tokens and Embeddings
challenges.description: Tokenization methods (BPE, WordPiece, SentencePiece), subword tokenization, word2vec, CBOW, Skip-gram, contextual embeddings

challenges.title: Looking Inside Large Language Models
challenges.description: Transformer architecture deep dive: self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encoding, layer normalization, residual connections, and feedforward networks

challenges.title: Text Classification
challenges.description: Using LLMs for classification: task-specific models, zero-shot and few-shot classification, embedding-based approaches, evaluation metrics

challenges.title: Text Clustering and Topic Modeling
challenges.description: Text clustering pipeline, k-means, HDBSCAN, dimensionality reduction, UMAP, BERTopic, evaluation metrics

challenges.title: Prompt Engineering
challenges.description: Prompt engineering techniques: zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought, temperature, top-p, prompt templates, ReAct, safety considerations

challenges.title: Advanced Text Generation Techniques and Tools
challenges.description: LangChain framework, model quantization, memory types, agents and tools, chains, RAG

challenges.title: Semantic Search and Retrieval-Augmented Generation
challenges.description: Dense retrieval, vector databases, document chunking, reranking, RAG pipelines, evaluation metrics
